title: Short title
doc_html:
§2862. Short title

            This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Pharmacy Benefit Manager Licensing Law".

            Acts 2019, No. 124, §3, eff. July 1, 2020.
doc_text:
§2862. Short title
This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Pharmacy Benefit Manager
Licensing Law".
Acts 2019, No. 124, §3, eff. July 1, 2020.
